abilities.name: swarm
abilities.description: Strengthens bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

effectChanges.description: Increases the frequency of cries heard on the overworld if any party Pokémon has this ability.

abilities.name: guts
abilities.description: Increases Attack to 1.5× with a major status ailment.

effectChanges.description: Does not take effect during sleep.

abilities.name: moxie
abilities.description: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokémon.
